news.title: Nahid Rahman promoted to Bangladesh Bank executive director
news.snippet: She has served in several key departments and holds postgraduate qualifications from institutions in Bangladesh and Japan.

news.snippet: From early morning, students were seen wading through waterlogged streets to reach examination centres.

news.snippet: Barrister Fahmida Akhter appeared for the petitioner during the hearing.

news.title: Dhaka South to host week-long 'Hridoye Dhaka' festival to mark city's 416th anniversary
news.snippet: The week-long programme will feature a wide range of cultural, heritage and recreational events.

news.snippet: The operation had remained suspended since 7 July.

news.title: Ducsu VP Shadik Kayem resigns from Chhatra Shibir
news.snippet: The Ducsu VP did not disclose the reason for leaving the student organisation and could not be reached for comment.

news.title: Road caves in at Dholaikhal after suspected Wasa pipe leak, traffic suspended

news.title: IMF agrees to phased reform roadmap for new Bangladesh programme: Khosru
news.snippet: The lender praised the government's recent progress in financial sector reforms, capital market development and revenue mobilisation, with further negotiations expected later this year.

news.snippet: He said the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) has been conducting regular field inspections nationwide, operating mobile courts, collecting medicine samples for laboratory testing, carrying out intelligence-based drives and conducting...

news.title: Matarbari deep seaport to begin operations in 2029: Minister Rabiul
news.snippet: He disclosed the information in a written reply to a question from Chapainawabganj-3 MP Md Nurul Islam during the question-and-answer session in parliament.

news.title: Flood death toll rises to 54; over 6 lakh affected in seven districts
news.snippet: More than 1.55 lakh families remain marooned, while over 38,000 people have taken refuge in 1,049 flood shelters.

news.title: Govt to decide on Ad-din Hospital after fresh inspection: Minister
news.snippet: Authorities will assess the hospital’s corrective measures before deciding its next course of action.

news.title: The de-commonisation of the Brahmaputra: A call for transformative governance
news.snippet: As climate change and competing national interests intensify, the Brahmaputra needs cooperative, transboundary governance that treats the river as a shared common rather than a contested resource

news.title: Flood situation may worsen in Sylhet, Sunamganj, four points above danger level
news.snippet: Water at four monitoring stations on three rivers was flowing above the danger level.

news.title: Govt has no plan to cancel or renegotiate Laldia Container Terminal deal: Shipping minister
news.snippet: He said Bangladesh and Denmark signed a memorandum of understanding on 30 June 2021 to promote environmentally sustainable infrastructure development

news.title: Gold prices fall again as Bajus cuts rates for 2nd  time this week
news.snippet: Bajus last adjusted gold prices on the morning of July 10, when the price of 22-carat gold, including VAT, was raised by Tk 2,216 to Tk 224,182 per bhori.

news.title: Power Division opens control room to ensure uninterrupted electricity nationwide amid floods
news.snippet: The control room will operate daily from 7:00am to 9:00pm, with emergency communication continuing beyond scheduled hours if required.

news.title: Doctors' leave cancelled in 11 flood-hit districts as medical teams deployed
news.snippet: Health Minister Sardar Sakhawat Husain announced the measures at a press briefing at the Ministry of Health today on healthcare activities in the flood-affected areas.

news.title: Bangladesh aims to become global model for disability inclusion: State minister
news.snippet: The government plans to establish specialised rehabilitation centres in every district.

news.title: Govt to introduce Play, STEM Labs in primary education: Bobby Hajjaj
news.snippet: Referring to BRAC's Play Lab and STEM Lab models, the government is currently reviewing these models, he says.

news.title: Hasina will have to land in jail if surrenders: Shama Obaed
news.snippet: Shama Obaed said Hasina has already been convicted and that it is entirely up to her where and when she will surrender.

news.title: Measles: Death toll at 759 as one more child dies

news.title: 86 snakebite cases reported in 7 days as floodwaters rise in Ctg; waterborne diseases on the rise
news.snippet: Chattogram health officials noted that a crisis of safe drinking water and sanitation during floods rapidly accelerates the risk of diarrhoea and other waterborne illnesses

news.title: Heavy rain leaves Faridpur Medical College Hospital waterlogged, disrupting medical services
news.snippet: The waterlogging was caused by poor drainage and inadequate urban planning.

news.title: All upazila hospitals to get modern pathology labs by this year: Health minister
news.snippet: The minister outlined plans to make healthcare more accessible at the grassroots level.

news.title: Rethinking Bangladesh’s economic ties with the US as it turns 250

news.title: Nagad transforms country's fintech landscape
news.snippet: As digital payments become increasingly common in Bangladesh, Nagad's record monthly transaction volume reflects the sector's continued expansion

news.title: This city is no longer mine
news.snippet: The absence of economic decentralisation and long-term urban planning has turned Dhaka into one of the world's least liveable cities despite its central role in Bangladesh's economy

news.title: BGMEA to hold overseas roadshows to attract new garment buyers
news.snippet: The events will be jointly organised by BGMEA and HSBC.

news.title: Default loans to be curbed through NPL resolution guideline, BB tells IMF
news.snippet: Guidelines expected to be issued by Dec, come into effect from 2027.

news.title: Bangladesh-developed ventilator 'VENTUS' successfully completes initial clinical trial
news.snippet: The ventilator successfully supported a patient's breathing for nearly two hours during its first clinical trial, though further testing and regulatory approval are required.

news.title: Govt steps up talks with BRICS bank, multilateral lenders for budget support
news.snippet: The finance minister says the government is seeking concessional financing to ease pressure on foreign exchange reserves and ensure funding for priority development projects.

news.title: DU postpones all exams scheduled for Monday amid adverse weather
news.snippet: All internal examinations scheduled for 13 July have been postponed, while exams at affiliated and constituent colleges and institutes will proceed as scheduled.

news.title: Cash incentive for domestic textile exports raised to 5%
news.snippet: The policy aims to encourage exporters to source more yarn and fabrics locally, with industry stakeholders expecting the move to boost domestic value addition and strengthen the country's competitiveness in global markets.

news.title: HSC, equivalent exams to go on across country except Chattogram Board

news.title: Five merged banks under special forensic audit; finance minister vows action against those responsible

news.title: Govt's outstanding debt reaches Tk22.06 lakh crore: Khosru tells parliament
news.snippet: The finance minister says the government is prioritising higher revenue collection, greater investment and cheaper long-term financing to reduce dependence on borrowing and ensure sustainable debt management.

news.title: AL govt spent Tk982.9cr on Mujib Borsho celebrations, finance minister tells parliament
news.snippet: The expenditure covered nationwide programmes, construction of portraits, memorials and statues of Sheikh Mujibur Rahman, and installation of digital countdown boards, while the government says a decision on auditing the spending has yet to be made.

news.snippet: The government will maintain tight monetary policy while expanding production support, strengthening technology-based tax enforcement and widening data integration to improve revenue collection and contain inflation.

news.snippet: Over 35 lakh bKash customers availed the loan from City Bank so far under the digital nano loan platform, reflecting an improvement in democratising access to credit for marginal people.

news.title: Football fandom, consumer culture, and the politics of visibility

news.title: Bangladesh retains 2nd spot in US apparel market as China slump reshapes sourcing
news.snippet: US buyers continued shifting away from China, but Bangladesh has yet to capture a significant share of the redirected apparel orders despite remaining the second-largest supplier.

news.snippet: Students claimed the ICT question paper was difficult and that invigilators did not assist them during the exam.

news.snippet: Flood-hit areas have also been instructed to appoint focal persons for round-the-clock coordination with the DGHS control room.

news.title: ILO Convention on Decent Work in the Platform Economy, 2026: A changemaking blueprint for Bangladesh

news.title: Humans versus human resources
news.snippet: People can be both an asset and, under certain circumstances, a liability for a country

news.title: How conflicting policy signals are keeping private investment on hold
news.snippet: Economists argue that lower taxes alone are not enough to drive private investment when financing and business conditions remain challenging.

news.title: Fiscal policy says spend, monetary policy says stop: Can investment gain pace amid this policy standoff?
news.snippet: The million-dollar question is whether businesses will invest when lending rates sit at 12-14%. Businesses say they need 15-18% operating profit just to service debt but profits remain thin or nonexistent. Without that margin, investment stalls.

news.title: Vegetable exports fail to grow due to weak diversification of basket and market
news.snippet: Export Promotion Bureau data show that vegetable exports earned $88.88 million in FY26, up 9.57% from $81.12 million a year earlier. But this is $14.36 million below the $103.24 million earned in FY15

news.title: Bangladesh's girls value family as much as ever, yet for nearly half, marriage comes before they can choose

news.title: EU tells Instagram, Facebook to change addictive features or risk fines
news.snippet: The European Commission's preliminary findings follow a two-year investigation under the European Union's landmark Digital Services Act, which requires large online platforms to do more to tackle illegal and harmful content.

news.title: Funding the unfundable: What Bangladesh's banks still cannot see
